excerpt: Travelers stranded at a remote sanatorium fall prey to a reincarnated Count Dracula seeking a virgin to fall in love with him to fulfill a prophecy and resurrect his daughter.
title: Count Dracula's Great Love

excerpt: A renowned artist encounters his dead wife’s doppelgänger and finds he can only create by painting with the blood of murder victims.
title: Blood Delirium

excerpt: A man drives out to a remote cabin with his girlfriend, where he unwittingly unleashes an evil entity capable of possessing the living and the dead.
title: Evil Dead II

excerpt: In 1957 New Zealand, a shy young man struggles to juggle a burgeoning romance, his domineering mother, and a zombie outbreak.
title: Braindead

excerpt: A young girl steps through her mirror into a world of talking chess pieces, sobbing turtles, mad queens, and clumsy knights.
title: Alice in Wonderland
